title: Algerian Cilantro Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and quick stir-fry recipe originating from Algeria, made with cilantro and a variety of fresh ingredients.

ingredients.name: Fresh
ingredients.notes: Mixed green beans and bell peppers

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed green beans and bell peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the sliced zucchini and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the Algerian spice blend and salt to taste.
Add the fresh cilantro leaves and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
